TITLE Miso-Maple Chicken With Brussels Sprouts

# Heat the oven to 425 degrees on convection roast.
# In a large bowl combine:{
[1/3 cup white miso]
[1/3 cup maple syrup]
[1/3 cup olive oil]
[1 tsp ground cumin]
}; emulsify.
# Trim and half [12 oz brussels sprouts]; add to bowl.
# Cut [2 lbs chicken breast] into 1.5 inch pieces; add to bowl. 
# Toss all ingredients together. 
# Add everything to the baking sheet, arranging in a single layer. Scrape any marinade left in the bowl over the mixture on the baking sheet.
# Bake until chicken is cooked through sprouts are lightly charred.
